title: JJK – Central 47 Database Terminal
description: Jujutsu Sorcery Commission classified network terminal. Opens from the Journal sidebar — available to all players and the GM for in-session roleplay access.
description-changes: v1.4.0 — Compose overhaul: posts now KEEP their paragraphs and line breaks, plus a formatting toolbar (bold / italic / underline, four fonts, colour swatches) so your threads can look like everyone else's. Fixed the big one — posting a new thread on Foundry now spawns in-character replies (previously only comment-replies generated). Two new boards: /THEORIES and /GENERAL.
